title: Citrusy Argentinian Cheese Grill
description: A refreshing, post-workout dish that combines the flavors of Argentina with the creaminess of melted cheese.

ingredients.name: Garden herbs (such as oregano, thyme, rosemary)

instructions: In a large resealable plastic bag, combine orange and lime juice, garlic, and garden herbs.
Add the skirt steak, turning to coat evenly with the marinade.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight, flipping the steak occasionally.
Remove the steak from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the steak for 4-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Cut the steak against the grain into thin strips.
Place the cheese slices on the grill and cook until melted and bubbly.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the steak onto a plate, top with a slice of melted cheese, and serve immediately.
